title: Anti Overfitting Self Improvement Review
goal: Resolve #407 by making repo-local self-improvement dogfooding closeout require an explicit anti-overfitting review.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: Self-improvement work has a lightweight checked-in anti-overfitting closeout step that separates user/agent value from internal neatness and routes ambiguity to review.
intent.constraints: Keep the step repo-local, low-residue, and non-shipped; do not create a heavy score or governance process.
intent.latitude: Tighten the existing repo-owned skill and add focused regression coverage for the expected review fields and routing rule.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, update external issue evidence, and close #407 with proof.
execution.proof: Run the focused maintainer-surface test, package-selected proof commands, planning doctor, summary, and reconcile.

invariants: The skill stays repo-owned and non-shipped.
Anti-overfitting remains a lightweight closeout review, not an automatic score.
Ambiguous product direction or portability tradeoffs route to planning review instead of issue closure.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Keep repo-local package self-improvement aligned with user value, portability, and human-owned why instead of optimizing for internal artifact neatness.

iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Self-improvement dogfooding closeout now requires named anti-overfitting fields and routes unclear value or portability ambiguity to planning review.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Refresh summary and promote another explicit child slice from the weak-agent recovery lane.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Add an explicit anti-overfitting review step to self-improvement dogfooding closeout.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep it repo-local, low-residue, non-shipped, and review-shaped rather than score-shaped.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact wording and focused regression-test placement.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger intended outcome separately from this bounded slice.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Keep the slice bounded while carrying any larger follow-on through explicit continuation fields.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

active_milestone.scope: Repo-owned self-improvement skill wording and focused maintainer-surface regression coverage.

immediate_next_action: Archive this plan, update external issue evidence, and close #407 with proof.
invariants: The skill stays repo-owned and non-shipped.
Anti-overfitting remains a lightweight closeout review, not an automatic score.
Ambiguous product direction or portability tradeoffs route to planning review instead of issue closure.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Self-improvement work has explicit closeout fields for user/agent value, surface pressure, portability boundary, and human-owned intent.
The closeout rule routes product-direction, authority, portability, unclear value, and additive-surface ambiguity to planning review.
The requirement remains repo-local and protected by a focused regression test.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Repo-owned self-improvement dogfooding guidance now requires a compact anti-overfitting review before closeout, with explicit fields for user/agent value, surface pressure, portability boundary, and human-owned intent.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run pytest tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py -q -k anti_overfitting; uv run pytest tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: none for #407; broader weak-agent recovery lane remains open through sibling issues.
execution_summary.resume from: Refresh summary and select the next explicit child slice.

anti_overfitting_review.user_agent_value: Self-improvement closeout now has a concrete check that the change reduced real entry, recovery, proof, closure, handoff, or operating cost instead of merely making repo artifacts neater.
anti_overfitting_review.surface_pressure: No new first-contact or shipped package surface was added; the existing repo-owned self-improvement skill was tightened and a focused regression test protects the requirement.
anti_overfitting_review.portability_boundary: The guidance explicitly checks repo, language, tooling, host, vendor, and agent-runtime assumptions before treating self-improvement output as package contract.
anti_overfitting_review.human_intent_preserved: The closeout requires a named human-intent field and this execplan preserves the larger intent separately from implementation details.

proof_report.validation proof: All package-selected and focused proof commands passed.
proof_report.proof achieved now: The skill requires anti-overfitting closeout fields and planning-review routing for ambiguity, and the focused maintainer-surface test protects those fields.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: tools/skills/self-improvement-dogfooding/SKILL.md; tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py; validation commands recorded in execution_summary.validation confirmed

discard.summary: No additional shipped product workflow or scoring surface is needed for #407.

continuation.summary: none for #407; broader weak-agent recovery lane remains open through sibling issues.
